announcements.title: Text Message Failed to be Delivered to Rosalind M. Cook
announcements.body:
AppFolio Property Manager
[https://public.cdn.appfolio.com/public/images/apm-primary-horizontal-white-bg.png]

TEXT MESSAGE FAILED TO BE DELIVERED TO ROSALIND M. COOK

The message failed to be delivered for the following reason:
The destination number is unable to receive this message. Potential reasons
could include trying to reach a landline or, in the case of short codes, an
unreachable carrier.

To Rosalind M. Cook (941) 387-9614 - on July 07 at 01:47 PM
Hi Rosalind, L'Ambiance at Longboat Key Club Condo Assoc. has invited you to
activate your Online Portal account at https://appfol.io/j5X4Z9l2. You have 72
hours to activate it. Reply STOP to unsubscribe.
